properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To the river I am going Bringing sins I cannot bear Come and cleanse me, come forgive me, Lord, I need to meet you there.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Precious Jesus, I am ready To surrender every care, Take my hand now, lead me closer, Lord, I need to meet you there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In these waters, healing mercy Flows with freedom from despair, I am going, to that river, Lord, I need to meet you there.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come and join us in the river, Come find life beyond compare, He is calling, He is waiting, Jesus longs to meet you there.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take my hand now, lead me closer, Lord I need to meet you there.
